generated_oml:
instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation-based insights for optimizing building lifecycle processes"
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics insights for proactive maintenance and operational improvements"
]

instance OperationalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational insights for monitoring and control of building systems"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization insights for data-driven infrastructure management decisions"
]

instance MonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring insights for building performance and system status"
]

instance ControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Control insights enabling automated adjustments and responses in building operations"
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for analyzing building lifecycle processes and operational scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight, PredictiveAnalyticsInsight
]

instance AnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis service for generating actionable insights from real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for enhancing decision-making capabilities in infrastructure management"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization service providing immersive interfaces for monitoring and control"
    DTDFVocab:provides MonitoringInsight, ControlInsight
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) process for extracting structured representations from enriched BIM models and generating deployable DT artifacts with minimal manual intervention"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService
]

instance ModularArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points facilitating integration of custom services and analytics for adaptive evolution of Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService, VisualizationService
]

instance LivingLabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Living Lab case study as a real-world infrastructure test environment comprising a building or facility equipped with IoT sensors, actuators, and integrated cyber-physical systems. This Living Lab serves as a representative AECO domain asset, enabling the integration of static models with real-time operational data for comprehensive simulation, analysis, and optimization of building lifecycle processes."
    base:contains BuildingDataFlow
]

instance BuildingDataFlow : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time bidirectional data flows between physical buildings and digital counterparts facilitated by DT Framework"
]

instance BIMGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-derived geometric model for building components (sensors, actuators, controllers) transformed via Model-Driven Engineering principles"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance BIMSemanticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-derived semantic model for building components (sensors, actuators, controllers) transformed via Model-Driven Engineering principles"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance BuildingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data synchronized between physical infrastructure and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BuildingDataFlow
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModularArchitectureEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Facility Managers interact with the deployed digital twin for real-time monitoring and control, with bidirectional data exchange enabling control signals to be transmitted to physical building systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical assets and digital twins through continuous data exchange for live monitoring and immediate insights in infrastructure management."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Model-driven framework with modular architecture integrating Eclipse Hono and Ditto for IoT data management and Unreal Engine for high-fidelity visualization, operating as a central hub for component orchestration and resource coordination."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses four key stages: (1) initial device modeling within BIM environments by Building Control Engineers, where sensors, actuators, and controllers are defined to establish a semantic foundation; (2) Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation of enriched BIM models into structured, deployable DT artifacts with minimal manual intervention; (3) real-time data synchronization between physical infrastructure and the digital twin via continuous data exchange; and (4) evolution through modular extension points enabling DT Engineers to integrate custom analytics services, with Facility Managers utilizing interactive visualization for operational monitoring and control. Lifecycle governance is role-based, ensuring seamless transitions between stages through standardized workflows."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Nonfunctional requirements address interoperability across heterogeneous systems, though specific technical network infrastructure details such as communication protocols, topology, or security measures are not explicitly detailed in the provided documentation."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The framework employs a modular architecture with standardized extension points for scalable deployment, supporting runtime configuration management to enable adjustments without full redeployment, and addresses scalability from individual components to entire infrastructure systems as part of nonfunctional requirements. Interactive visualization provides immersive interfaces for monitoring and control."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework's modular architecture includes standardized extension points to enable interoperable integration of custom services and analytics."
]
